name: Paul Mullin
tagline: The Hollywood signing who delivered. League Two top scorer turned fifth-tier record-breaker — 38 league goals in the title-winning 2022-23 season.

name: Phil Parkinson
tagline: The promotion specialist. Delivered three consecutive promotions from the National League to the Championship — an unprecedented feat in English football history.

name: Ollie Palmer
tagline: The fan favourite target man whose partnership with Mullin powered three promotions. Signed for a reported club-record fee in January 2022.

name: Ben Tozer
tagline: The iconic long-throw specialist and club captain. Named in the National League Team of the Year. Ever-present in the 2022-23 title-winning campaign.

name: Luke Young
tagline: The heartbeat of the midfield and co-captain. A pre-takeover player who became integral to the new era across 259 appearances and two promotions.

name: Ben Foster
tagline: Former England and Manchester United keeper who came out of retirement at 39 to help clinch the National League title. Wrexham's oldest-ever league player.

name: Elliot Lee
tagline: Scored twice on debut. Named in the National League Team of the Year. A key creative force across three promotions.

name: Arthur Okonkwo
tagline: The former Arsenal academy keeper who became Wrexham's No. 1 after Ben Foster's retirement. 14 league clean sheets during the League Two promotion campaign.
